title: Dense Mekanism
description: Dense ores for Mekanism ores which have double the rates of the normal ores!
body: **Dense Mekanism** adds dense variations to all Mekanism ores. These ores can drop up to two times the amount of materials compared to the normal ores that Mekanism has. These ores spawn within the same ranges as Mekanism's ores; however, these dense ores are much more scarce and in smaller clumps, so keep an eye out! The dense ores drop more materials and can be mined using Fortune and Silk Touch, which will have their respective effects.
